purpose: Prove IAMScope emits validated admin reachability for the Env13 target IAM path when the complete SCP blocker is absent.
claim_surface: IAMScope can distinguish the Env13 complete-SCP blocked case from a closely related SCP-removed positive case.
IAMScope can emit validated admin_reachability for the mutated Env17 path without blocked or inconclusive admin findings.
IAMScope can preserve the target Alice-to-admin role shape while responding to the SCP removal.
benchmark_proves: For the Env17 alice->admin path, scenario.json contains the expected sts:AssumeRole permission edge.
For the Env17 alice->admin path, scenario.json contains the expected clean sts:AssumeRole trust edge.
For that path, the target trust edge is not bound to an SCP constraint.
For that path, IAMScope emitted at least one validated admin_reachability finding.
For that path, IAMScope emitted zero blocked admin_reachability findings.
For that path, IAMScope emitted zero inconclusive admin_reachability findings.
For that path, IAMScope emitted zero SCP blockers on validated admin_reachability findings.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not yet machine-score the pairwise delta versus Env13 as a single combined assertion.
It does not prove broader SCP correctness.
It does not prove inherited SCP, OU/root SCP, or complex Organizations exception behavior.
unknowns_remaining: Whether every complete SCP removal should validate remains unproven here.
Whether multi-account AssumeRole paths interact with SCP removal the same way remains outside this case.

environment.notes: Mutation of Env13 with the same target IAM path shape but no Env17-created or attached SCP.

ground_truth.reason: Alice can assume env17-admin, env17-admin trusts Alice, env17-admin has AdministratorAccess, and the Env13 complete SCP Deny blocker is absent.

directly_proven_if_pass: The exact Env17 alice->admin permission edge exists structurally.
The exact Env17 alice->admin trust edge exists structurally.
The exact Env17 alice->admin trust edge is not bound to an SCP constraint.
The exact Env17 alice->admin path is emitted as validated admin reachability.
The exact Env17 alice->admin path is not emitted as blocked or inconclusive.
The exact Env17 alice->admin path has no SCP blocker evidence.
strongly_supported_if_pass: IAMScope responds meaningfully to this narrow SCP-removal mutation in a controlled real-AWS case.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader SCP removal behavior outside this exact case remains only implied.
